title: --password-stdin flag in `podman login`
body:
Support `--password-stdin` flag, reads a password from STDIN and pass it to `podman login`.
enhancement mentioned https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/1675#issuecomment-440265632
Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: Test errors look unrelated.  Need updates to the man page and bash completions.  The code looks good though.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *QiWang19*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod).
